name: Google Antigravity
mcp: Use Antigravity MCP configuration and distinguish SDK features from CLI features.
permissions: Keep approvals explicit for external actions and artifact publication.
autonomy: Use planning artifacts, version checks, budgets, and human checkpoints before implementation loops.
evidence_capture: Retain visual artifacts, plans, command output, and KBD memory.
handoff: Export artifact references and KBD waypoints for cross-harness continuation.
recovery: If the installed SDK lacks a documented feature, record the version gap and route through another verified harness.
public_boundary_verification: Use Antigravity artifacts as evidence only when paired with a runnable public boundary.
